name: Oatmeal-Apple Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
2. Grease muffin tins.
3. Mix egg whites, milk, and oil in a bowl.
4. Add dry ingredients and mix until combined.
5. Fold in raisins and apples.
6. Place batter in muffin tins; fill each 3/4 full.
7. Bake for about 20 minutes or until centers seem dry.
